name: Weekly Review
description: Manually trigger your end-of-week review. Summarizes the week, checks SSP progress, creates customer health scorecards, and plans next week.

then.prompt: Run the Weekly Review SOP. Read the SOP from sops/weekly-review.md and execute each step. Summarize the week's activity, check SSP progress for each customer, create health scorecards, and generate next week's plan. Save the output to customers/_weekly-reviews/ with the current week number.
